meta.description: A decision — a choice made with rationale, alternatives considered and owner

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_7659a0fb_98e0_4aea_9303_9e85fecc8277" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "title" TEXT,
    "date" TEXT,
    "status" TEXT,
    "context" TEXT,
    "decision" TEXT,
    "rationale" TEXT,
    "consequences" TEXT,
    "deciders" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "owner" TEXT,
    "superseded_by" TEXT,
    "tags" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_7659a0fb_98e0_4aea_9303_9e85fecc8277" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_7659a0fb98e04aea_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
